chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Visiting the Prophet {saws} and the Imams {a.s}, Peace Be Upon Them All

text: 3178 - وَ رَوَى هَارُونُ بْنُ خَارِجَةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «إِذَا كَانَ اَلنِّصْفُ مِنْ شَعْبَانَ نَادَى مُنَادٍ مِنَ اَلْأُفُقِ اَلْأَعْلَى: يَا زَائِرِي قَبْرِ اَلْحُسَيْنِ اِرْجِعُوا مَغْفُوراً لَكُمْ ثَوَابُكُمْ عَلَى رَبِّكُمْ وَ مُحَمَّدٍ نَبِيِّكُمْ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3178 - Harun ibn Khariqah narrated from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"When it is the middle of Sha‘ban, a caller from the highest horizon announces: 'O visitors of the grave of Husayn (as), return forgiven. Your reward is with your Lord (azj) and Muhammad, your Prophet.'"
